channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2607] Hit LBUG when runing sanity test_225a under zfs (osd_object.c:1200:__osd_object_create())
item.description:
Hit LBUG when running sanity test_225a under zfs ofed build:

dmesg from MDS:
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: -----============= acceptance-small: sanity ============----- Fri Jan 11 14:25:04 PST 2013

[root@fat-amd-1 ~]# Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Using TIMEOUT=100
LNet: 4685:0:(debug.c:324:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) You are trying to use a numerical value for the mask - this will be deprecated in a future release.
Lustre: ctl-lustre-MDT0000: super-sequence allocation rc = 0 [0x0000000200000400-0x0000000240000400):0:mdt
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: only running test 225a
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: excepting tests: 76 27u 42a 42b 42c 42d 45 51d 68b
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 225a: Metadata survey sanity with zero-stripe == 14:25:31 (1357943131)
Lustre: Echo OBD driver; http://www.lustre.org/
LustreError: 5069:0:(echo_client.c:1755:echo_md_lookup()) lookup tests: rc = -2
LustreError: 5069:0:(echo_client.c:1945:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Can't find child tests: rc = -2
LustreError: 5094:0:(echo_client.c:1755:echo_md_lookup()) lookup tests1: rc = -2
LustreError: 5094:0:(echo_client.c:1945:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Can't find child tests1: rc = -2
LustreError: 5165:0:(osd_object.c:1200:__osd_object_create()) ASSERTION( la->la_valid & LA_MODE ) failed: 
LustreError: 5166:0:(osd_object.c:1200:__osd_object_create()) ASSERTION( la->la_valid & LA_MODE ) failed: 
LustreError: 5166:0:(osd_object.c:1200:__osd_object_create()) LBUG
Pid: 5166, comm: lctl

Call Trace:
LustreError: 5168:0:(osd_object.c:1200:__osd_object_create()) ASSERTION( la->la_valid & LA_MODE ) failed: 
LustreError: 5168:0:(osd_object.c:1200:__osd_object_create()) LBUG
Pid: 5168, comm: lctl

Call Trace:

item.environment: build lustre-master 1142 OFED build with zfs
item.summary: Hit LBUG when runing sanity test_225a under zfs (osd_object.c:1200:__osd_object_create())

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: I have a patch, will post soon.
